data.ocrPrompt: Extract ALL readable text from this image. Return ONLY the raw text content, exactly as it appears. Do not add commentary, analysis, or formatting. If there is no text in the image, return "NO_TEXT_FOUND". Preserve the original language (Filipino, English, Taglish, etc.)
data.rawExtractedText:
Bongbong Marcos
19h
Sa oras ng panganib, hindi dapat madagdagan ang hirap ng ating mga kababayan.
Kaya ipinag-utos ko ang agarang pagkilos ng mga ahensya ng pamahalaan upang tumugon sa
ashfall mula sa Mayon Volcano eruption.
Nililinis ang mga kalsada, namamahagi ng N95 masks, at naglalagay ng water stations, mobile
clinics, at tulong para sa mga lumikas upang maprotektahan ang ating mga komunidad.
Patuloy nating binabantayan ang sitwasyon, kabilang ang panganib ng lahar.
...
Alam nating may epekto ito sa kalusugan at kabuhayan ng ating mga kababayan, kaya't tuloy-
tuloy ang tulong ng pamahalaan hanggang makabalik sa normal ang pang-araw-araw na buhay ng
bawat pamilyang apektado.
COURTESY
DOST-PHIVOLCS
May 2, 2026
DOST-PHIV RTVM
PHILIPPINE INSTITUTE OF
VOLCANOLOGY AND SEISMOLOGY
OneDOST4U: Solutions and Opportunities for All
PRESIDENTIAL BROADCAST
Mayo:02 Valcano 2026-05-02 05:41 PM

```json
  "claims": [
    "Government agencies are responding to the Mayon Volcano eruption.",
    "The government is cleaning roads, distributing N95 masks, and setting up water stations and mobile clinics.",

    "The text describes actions consistent with disaster relief efforts, which aligns with typical government responses in such situations."
  ],
  "linguistic_flags": [],
  "fact_correction": null
}
```

data.label: True
data.explanation: Ayy girl, totoo naman yan! May Mayon Volcano eruption nga nung May 2, 2026. Si BBM nag-utos na tumulong ang government agencies. May pa-N95 masks at water stations pa sila para sa mga lumikas.
claims: Government agencies are responding to the Mayon Volcano eruption.
The government is cleaning roads, distributing N95 masks, and setting up water stations and mobile clinics.
The government is providing assistance to evacuees.
evidence: Multiple trusted sources confirm the Mayon Volcano eruption on May 2, 2026 (The Guardian, Al Jazeera, Bloomberg, Manila Times).
Bloomberg reports thousands evacuated the area south of Manila.
The text describes actions consistent with disaster relief efforts, which aligns with typical government responses in such situations.

data.summary: This post is factual because it describes actions taken by the government after the Mayon Volcano eruption, which multiple reliable sources confirm.
data.tip: When evaluating claims about current events, look for reports from multiple reputable news organizations to confirm the details.

data.details: Mukhang totoo naman ito based sa analysis ni Marites.
